Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Hmm the user has provided a detailed description of a property onboarding process and wants me to generate a list of open-ended questions to clarify and improve understanding The questions should focus on conceptual aspects like decision criteria roles timing and exceptions not technical implementation

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: first I need to identify gaps in the description The process seems linear but has many decision points and dependencies I should ask about how decisions are made at each stage especially around manager assignment and tenant selection The roles of different teams compliance finance IT need clarification how do they interact and when are they involved

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Timing and sequencing are important too How long does each phase typically take What happens if one step is delayed The description mentions exceptions like special insurance or custom lease clauses how are those handled Also communication methods are mentioned email CRM but how is information tracked and escalated

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I should also probe about metrics or success indicators How does the company measure the efficiency of this process Are there bottlenecks or common failure points Finally the interviewee might have insights into improvements or pain points they havent mentioned yet

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me structure the questions to flow logically start with overarching goals then dive into specific stages roles timing exceptions and finally continuous improvement Keep them open-ended to encourage detailed responses
